title: M&E Coordinator
description:
Job Description

  • Co-ordination and supervision of M&E works
  • Liaise with M&E Consultants
  • Ascertain and make provision for all M&E and building services in collaboration with the project staff
  • Monitor progress, quality of workmanship and compliance with authority requirements
  • Highlight and advise the project staff on the interfacing of M&E services and the building works
  • Coordination with multiple parties not limiting to design consultants / engineers, clients’ project representatives, statutory /authority agencies etc. for the establishment of the design deliverables requirements for submission
  • Review design deliverables together with the design consultants / engineers and ensure that it is in order for submission
  • Attend to technical clarifications as and when required to address technical issues and establish method statements
  • Project Management and sites supervision works.
  • Able to coordinate with contractors and consultants for engineering issues and drawing plans.
  • Perform all duties in accordance with company policies, processes, systems and procedures.

Job Requirement:

  • Minimum 5 years of relevant experience after tertiary education in relevant field in the construction supervision of E&M building services works for residential projects of similar scale, complexity, and nature of work, including A&A works within existing residential developments.
  • Holds Diploma in Electrical/Mechanical Engineering.
  • Experience in coordination of transit projects with BIM with full understanding of the design approval process and BCA TOP process.
  • Logical thinking and analytical skills
  • Excellent coordination and communication skills
  • Having experiences in High-Rise Residential Project would be bonus and advantageous.
  • Willing to work in site office.

postedCompany.description:
China Communications Construction Company Ltd. is a world leading super large infrastructure service provider, ranked 93th among Fortune Global 500 in 2019. As China's largest international contractor, we ranked the third among ENR’s Top250 International Contractors and the first among Chinese enterprises listed for 13 consecutive years.


We are mainly engaged in infrastructure investment, construction and operation, equipment manufacturing, real estate and urban development, etc., and offer clients package solutions and integrated services such as investment, financing, consultation, planning, design, construction, management and operation.
postedCompany.name: CHINA COMMUNICATIONS CONSTRUCTION COMPANY LIMITED (Singapore Branch)

districts.location: D16 Upper East Coast, Bedok, Eastwood, Kew Drive
